rect.title:
Factor power_prior
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 1 id: 1 variables: power degree: 1
Parameters table size: 2
Options initialize: true

Factor fuse_prior
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 2 id: 2 variables: fuse degree: 1
Parameters table size: 2
Options initialize: true

Factor motor_prior
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 3 id: 3 variables: motor degree: 1
Parameters table size: 2
Options initialize: true

Factor power_fuse
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 4 id: 4 variables: power, fuse degree: 2
Parameters table size: 2 x 2

Factor fuse_motor
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 5 id: 5 variables: fuse, motor degree: 2
Parameters table size: 2 x 2

Factor motor_vibration
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 6 id: 6 variables: motor, vibration degree: 2
Parameters table size: 2 x 2

Factor motor_temperature
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 7 id: 7 variables: motor, temperature degree: 2
Parameters table size: 2 x 2

Factor trip_logic
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 8 id: 8 variables: vibration, temperature, trip degree: 3
Parameters table size: 2 x 2 x 2

Factor obs_vibration
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 9 id: 9 variables: vibration degree: 1
Parameters table size: 2
Options initialize: false

Factor obs_temperature
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 10 id: 10 variables: temperature degree: 1
Parameters table size: 2
Options initialize: false

Factor obs_trip
Identity type: DiscreteFactor index: 11 id: 11 variables: trip degree: 1
Parameters table size: 2
Options initialize: false
